description: This file implements a service for managing explore recommendations pools, including caching, deduplication, fallback handling, and interaction with external repositories and Bedrock service. It handles in-flight deduplication per persona, cooldowns for failed Bedrock calls, and logic for fetching or generating recommendation roles.

methods.name: _sleep
methods.description: Returns a promise that resolves after a specified number of milliseconds.

methods.name: _withTimeout
methods.description: Wraps a promise with a timeout, resolving to null if timeout occurs.

methods.name: _coercePersonaJson
methods.description: Parses and extracts persona JSON from various formats or returns null.

methods.name: _looksLikeLegacySimpleRecommendedRole
methods.description: Checks if a role object matches legacy simple recommended role shape.

methods.name: _looksLikeInitialRecommendationRoleCard
methods.description: Checks if a role object resembles an initial recommendation role card.

methods.name: _isFallbackOnlyCachedRoles
methods.description: Determines if cached roles are fallback-only based on shape and metadata.

methods.name: _deriveStoreCount
methods.description: Calculates store count for recommendations pool based on environment variable.

methods.name: _resolveFinalPersonaOrFallback
methods.description: Attempts to load the final persona quickly, with fallbacks to latest or draft versions.

methods.name: _cleanupCooldownIfExpired
methods.description: Removes cooldown if it has expired for a given personaId.

methods.name: _cooldownMs
methods.description: Returns cooldown duration in milliseconds, configurable via environment variable.

methods.name: getOrCreateExploreRecommendationsPool
methods.description: Main exported function to get or create a recommendations pool for a persona, with caching, deduplication, fallback, and persistence logic.
